body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: proof-program ground-truth spine (temporal firewall)
body.description:
**What changed:** The proof-program's ground-truth anchor moves from the corpus to the temporal firewall it makes possible; verdicts get strength-graded and reality-filtered, replay's snapshot-contamination bug is fixed, and prospective pre-registration becomes the durable spine.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) The reality-tested filter may exclude MOST closed tickets — if little closed code has demonstrably executed, the answer key shrinks to near-empty; that shrinkage is itself a damning measurement of proof-on-close, but it could also stall the replay experiment for lack of gradable tickets. (2) verdict_strength could be misapplied — an entry labeled consequence_bearing when it is only executed_live silently re-imports the self-consistency trap. (3) The per-ticket parent-commit checkout in replay could be slow/expensive across many tickets or hit dirty-tree / missing-parent / merge-commit edge cases. (4) The pre-registration hook adds a failure surface to every live sprint — must be fail-soft or it becomes a sprint-blocker.

**Signals to watch:** PRIMARY metric — count of scored replays where verdict_strength >= consequence_bearing (zero today; must become >0 for the thesis to touch ground even once). Exclusion-count log from the replay harness (tickets dropped as not reality-tested). Read-log growth on the sealed eval slice (asymmetry spend rate). Sprint-path latency / error rate after the prereg hook lands.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-07-19 or when T-nexus-replay-experiment produces its first scored run.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

**Completion criteria:** by 2026-07-19 (or first scored replay run), the primary metric (count of scored replays with verdict_strength>=consequence_bearing) and the exclusion-count / eval-slice read-log / sprint-latency signals are annotated as occurred / clear / partial, and the ticket closed.
body.intention: I intend that the predicted unintended effects of the grounding-spine re-scope are observed against real signals before the decision is treated as settled.
